business.name: Macon Roofing Company
business.tagline: Solid roofs for Middle Georgia homes

hero.headline: When your *roof needs fixing*, we climb up
hero.subheadline: Rain or shine, we're the crew Macon calls when shingles start falling and gutters overflow.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every roof problem, handled right
services_section.subheading: From emergency patches to complete replacements

services.title: Roof Repairs
services.description: Missing shingles, damaged flashing, storm damage — we patch it up tight so the weather stays outside where it belongs.

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: When repair won't cut it anymore, we strip it down and build it back stronger. New shingles, new life for your home.

services.title: Gutter Services
services.description: Clean gutters, proper drainage, no more water pooling where it shouldn't. We handle the climbing so you don't have to.

services.title: Storm Damage Assessment
services.description: After the wind dies down, we climb up and tell you exactly what needs fixing. Honest assessment, fair pricing.

about.heading: Keeping Macon dry, one roof at a time
about.body: We're the local crew that shows up when your roof starts leaking at the worst possible moment. Every job gets the same attention — whether it's a quick patch or tearing off the whole thing and starting fresh. Middle Georgia weather is tough on roofs, and we know exactly how to build them back stronger.

cta.heading: Roof trouble? We'll take a look
cta.body: Call us for a straight assessment and fair quote. No pressure, just honest roofing work when you need it most.
